title: Favorite Kaworu Voice
wikitext:
[]: Favorite Kaworu Voice?             Quote Post by gloomyAmateur » Mon Feb 17, 2025 2:25 am Kaworu has many different voice actors throughout the different dubs and I'm wondering what everyone's favorites are! Personally, I love his voice in Death & Rebirth. It sounds especially angelic and poetic and overall just FITS him in my opinion. Share your thoughts! (Not limited to English dubs, obviously.)\ None of them beat Akira Ishida, obviously.

[]: Re: Favorite Kaworu Voice?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Feb 17, 2025 12:19 pm All other Kaworus pale beside Akira Ishida. Ishida is Kaworu.

[]: Re: Favorite Kaworu Voice?             Quote Post by MoonRabbitMallow » Sat Feb 22, 2025 5:48 pm Yeah, gonna say Akira Ishida too. To be honest, Kaworu is one of the few characters that don't have a distinct "voice" in my head, but if I had to choose, it would probably be him. If I had to choose an English VA, I actually quite like Greg Ayres' performance. Funnily enough though I also associate his voice with Kaoru Hitachiin from Ouran and cannot unhear it... same name, lol.

chunks.content:
Article: Favorite Kaworu Voice
[]: Favorite Kaworu Voice?             Quote Post by gloomyAmateur » Mon Feb 17, 2025 2:25 am Kaworu has many different voice actors throughout the different dubs and I'm wondering what everyone's favorites are! Personally, I love his voice in Death & Rebirth. It sounds especially angelic and poetic and overall just FITS him in my opinion. Share your thoughts! (Not limited to English dubs, obviously.)\ None of them beat Akira Ishida, obviously.

[]: Re: Favorite Kaworu Voice?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Feb 17, 2025 12:19 pm All other Kaworus pale beside Akira Ishida. Ishida is Kaworu.

[]: Re: Favorite Kaworu Voice?             Quote Post by MoonRabbitMallow » Sat Feb 22, 2025 5:48 pm Yeah, gonna say Akira Ishida too. To be honest, Kaworu is one of the few characters that don't have a distinct "voice" in my head, but if I had to choose, it would probably be him. If I had to choose an English VA, I actually quite like Greg Ayres' performance. Funnily enough though I also associate his voice with Kaoru Hitachiin from Ouran and cannot unhear it... same name, lol.
